name: ATAS
description_short: Professional order flow and volume analysis platform with 70+ volume tools, footprint charts, and Smart DOM for futures, stocks, and crypto traders.
description_long:
ATAS (Advanced Trading Analytical Software) is a dedicated order flow and volume analysis platform built for traders who need to see beyond price action. With 70+ volume analysis tools, 240+ indicators, and 400+ footprint cluster variations, ATAS gives you a granular view of what's happening inside each candlestick — who's buying, who's selling, and where the real liquidity sits.

The platform connects to 25+ global exchanges including CME, CBOT, NYMEX, NYSE, NASDAQ, Eurex, and major crypto exchanges like Binance, Bybit, and OKX. Its Smart DOM shows real-time order book depth with liquidity clustering, while Smart Tape filters noise from the time and sales feed to highlight institutional-sized orders.

ATAS is particularly strong for futures scalpers and crypto traders who trade based on order flow imbalances, volume profiles, and market microstructure. The built-in Market Replay feature lets you backtest strategies against historical tick data with full order book reconstruction, and the integrated journal tracks your performance statistics automatically.
pros: 70+ volume analysis tools with 400+ footprint cluster variations — deepest order flow toolkit available
Connects to 25+ exchanges including CME, NYSE, Binance, Bybit, and OKX
Free tier available for crypto traders to get started
Built-in Market Replay for backtesting with full order book history
Smart DOM and Smart Tape filter noise to show genuine institutional activity
Integrated trading journal with automatic performance tracking
cons: Windows only — no Mac or Linux native support
Steeper learning curve than chart-only platforms
Pro/Ultra tiers needed for full futures and stock market access
Data feed costs are separate from platform subscription

alt_meta_description: Top ATAS alternatives for order flow and volume analysis. Compare Bookmap, Sierra Chart, Jigsaw Trading, Quantower and more free and paid options for 2026.
scraped_features: 70+ Volume Analysis Tools — Volume Profile, VWAP, delta analysis, cumulative delta
240+ Indicators — classical TA combined with proprietary volume analytics
400+ Footprint Cluster Variations — examine buyer/seller activity inside each candle
Smart DOM — real-time order book visualization with liquidity clustering
Smart Tape — filtered time & sales showing institutional-sized orders
Market Replay — tick-by-tick historical replay with full order book reconstruction
Volume Profile — session, visible range, and fixed range profiles
Heatmap Visualization — see resting orders across price levels
Cluster Search — find specific volume patterns across timeframes
Built-in Trading Journal — automatic trade logging with statistics
One-Click Chart Trading — execute directly from charts
Multi-Monitor Support — spread analysis across multiple screens
unique_selling_points: 400+ footprint cluster variations give the deepest order flow analysis of any retail platform
Connects to 25+ global exchanges spanning futures, stocks, and crypto from a single platform
Smart DOM and Smart Tape proprietary filters remove market maker noise to reveal genuine liquidity
Built-in Market Replay reconstructs full order book history for realistic strategy backtesting
